_comment: EverPass insight->chain auto-sync hooks (Layer-2 Claude-specific wrapper, per OPERATOR-NOTES three-layer model). These tie market-intel insight notes into the cockpit chain automatically: any note added/edited under data/insights/ is propagated into data/mobile/mobile-cockpit.json by scripts/ingest_market_intel.py (idempotent; only rewrites when content changes). This is a REFERENCE SNIPPET — it is not active on its own. Install by merging the SessionStart + PostToolUse entries into the project's Claude Code settings.json (live tree) the same way hooks/preToolUse-snippet.json is mirrored into ~/.claude/settings.json. Both commands degrade gracefully (always exit 0) and resolve the repo via $CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR.

SessionStart._comment: On every session start, sync all insight notes into the cockpit chain. No-op unless a note changed since last sync (engine only writes on real content change).

hooks.command: bash -c 'DIR="${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR:-.}"; bash "$DIR/scripts/sync-insights-to-chain.sh" 1>&2 || true; echo "{\"hookSpecificOutput\":{\"hookEventName\":\"SessionStart\",\"additionalContext\":\"insight->chain: synced market-intel notes into the cockpit feed (ingest_market_intel.py --all).\"}}"'

PostToolUse._comment: When an Edit/Write touches data/insights/, re-run the ingest so the note's signal + partner-todo land in the cockpit feed immediately.

hooks.command: bash -c 'INPUT="$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT"; if echo "$INPUT" | grep -q "data/insights/"; then DIR="${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR:-.}"; bash "$DIR/scripts/sync-insights-to-chain.sh" 1>&2 || true; echo "{\"hookSpecificOutput\":{\"hookEventName\":\"PostToolUse\",\"additionalContext\":\"insight->chain: a data/insights note changed; ran ingest_market_intel.py --all to update the cockpit feed.\"}}"; else echo "{}"; fi'
